texto: I ate a lot of candy and engaged in light stalking: I prowled Blythe’s Instagram and Twitter, I read her reviews, considered photos of her baked goods and watched from a distance as she got on her soapbox – at one point bragging she was the only person she knew who used her real name and profession online. As my fascination mounted, and my self-loathing deepened, I reminded myself that there are worse things than rabid bloggers (cancer, for instance) and that people suffer greater degradations than becoming writers. But still, I wanted to respond.
explicacao: Citação de Kathleen Hale sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I ate a lot of candy and engaged in light stalking: I prowled Blythe’s Instagram and Twitter, I r…” articula reflexao, crazy, goodreads em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como goodreads e stalking.
